train.prompt: Optimize the tdd-workflow skill description for better activation
Run GEPA on all my skills to improve their routing accuracy
Create eval data for my new django-patterns skill with positive and negative test prompts
Check the optimization status, how many skills have been evaluated so far
My security-review skill never activates when I ask about XSS, can you improve its description
The skill activation hook log is empty, diagnose why skills are not being detected
Show me the GEPA results for all completed skills, which ones improved
Write a Python function that validates email addresses
Deploy the application to production with Docker
Review my pull request for code quality issues

val.prompt: Evaluate how well my skill descriptions route to the right skills
Apply the best GEPA description to the api-design skill
Set up database migrations for the users table
Write Playwright E2E tests for the login flow
